title: Project-Oriented Education Synchronized with Industry
one_liner: A sprint-based university engineering model built around a real hardware project, daily standups, public artifacts, and grant-ready outputs.
summary: A case study of integrating an industrial delivery model into university teaching: PM → Leads → Executors hierarchy, three-week sprints, real hardware work, grant-oriented artifacts, and partner-facing visibility from the start.
note: Built as a reusable case for department development, grant preparation, and partner communication.

title: Methods and models for ensuring safety and diagnosing critical parameters in complex systems using IoT
one_liner: Methods and models for safety and diagnostics of critical parameters in IoT-oriented complex systems.
summary: Fundamental research focused on reliability and safety in IoT-enabled complex systems, with emphasis on identification, monitoring, and diagnostics of critical parameters.
note: In 2025 I assumed project leadership after Yu. Khlaponin stopped participating.

title: Identification of transition to a post-critical operating mode of a robotic system
one_liner: Identification of a robotic system entering a post-critical mode for subsequent control and recovery.
summary: Applied research into base methods and identifiers for detecting a robotic system's transition to a post-critical mode, aimed at restoring operability under high-criticality system requirements.
note: I currently maintain and evolve this project on behalf of KNUBA.

title: Distributed control of a spherical robot on a profiled surface (ROS2/DDS)
customer: Institute of Precision Mechanics, NAS of Ukraine
one_liner: ROS2/DDS-based distributed control for a gyrostabilized spherical robot: local-maximum search and stabilization on selected peaks.
summary: Educational test bench: two PCs with ROS2 plus an MCU control a gyrostabilized sphere moving over a profiled surface. The focus is extremum-seeking and stabilization with real-time metrics.

title: PoC: navigation for a high-inertia object in a Lyapunov-like state space
one_liner: Proof of concept for a navigation system for a high-inertia object, focused on positioning near unstable equilibrium in a Lyapunov-like state space.
summary: Proof of concept for navigation and positioning of a high-inertia controlled object in a Lyapunov-like state space, with emphasis on holding near unstable equilibrium under timing constraints. Implemented as an engineering test stand; parts were later adapted into NDA-covered systems.

title: Pet projects (robotics and engineering tooling)
one_liner: A collection of pet projects for robotics and embedded prototyping; public artifacts are published as they become ready.
summary: A curated set of small robotics and embedded prototypes used as scaffolding for experiments, tooling, and repeatable test stands. Public artifacts are released progressively.

title: Automotive test systems (NDA-safe)
one_liner: NDA-safe description: ECU test systems, signal switching, power/load control, and validation automation.
summary: NDA-safe overview of automotive test systems: signal switching and routing for multiple ECUs, power and load control, automated validation workflows, and traceability of test artifacts. Details are restricted by customer agreements.
